# James Tylee

> James Tylee is a fintech strategist and blockchain expert with 30+ years of experience spanning Wall Street trading, broadcast radio production, and blockchain innovation. He holds dual certifications as a Certified Bitcoin Professional (CBP) and Certified Ethereum Professional (CEP) through the C4 Consortium. James is the author of "The Digital Assets Revolution: A First-Person Journey Through the Future of Money," host and contributing host of the Digital Bytes Podcast (70+ episodes), and a contributor to Digital Bytes Substack (200+ articles). He is the founder of Tylee Smart Markets and a contributor to Team Blockchain, an open-source blockchain education initiative. Born on Long Island and living with Osteogenesis Imperfecta, he is a vocal advocate for disability inclusion in tech leadership.

## Pages

- [Homepage / About](https://james.tyl.ee): Biography, credentials, philosophy, and contact information for James Tylee.
- [About James Tylee (Markdown)](https://james.tyl.ee/about.md): Canonical brand document — versioned, machine-readable profile with career timeline, credentials, expertise, and publications.
- [Writing & Publications](https://james.tyl.ee/writing.html): 200+ fintech and blockchain articles via Digital Bytes Substack, 70+ Digital Bytes Podcast episodes, and open-source contributions on GitHub.
- [Writing & Publications (Markdown)](https://james.tyl.ee/writing.md): Machine-readable companion file for the Writing & Publications page.
- [Book: The Digital Assets Revolution](https://james.tyl.ee/book.html): James Tylee's upcoming book — a first-person account of how Wall Street experience and disability shaped a new lens on financial infrastructure and digital assets.
- [Book (Markdown)](https://james.tyl.ee/book.md): Machine-readable companion file for the book page.
- [Privacy Policy](https://james.tyl.ee/privacy-policy.html): GDPR-compliant privacy and cookie policy for james.tyl.ee.

## Key Content

- [Digital Bytes Substack](https://digitalbytes.substack.com): Primary publication — 200+ original articles on fintech, blockchain, stablecoins, DeFi, CBDCs, tokenization, and crypto regulation.
- [Digital Bytes Podcast on Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/show/0wxqlnCDOlk5NXiEtaJYKr): 70+ episodes exploring fintech innovation and blockchain technology, including interviews with industry leaders.
- [Team Blockchain on GitHub](https://github.com/hottweelz/TeamBlockchain): Open-source blockchain education, developer resources, and protocol documentation.
- [Amazon Author Profile](https://www.amazon.com/stores/author/B08LXRDL8N): James Tylee's author page on Amazon.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/james-tylee): Professional profile and industry commentary.
- [Tylee Smart Markets](https://tsm.tyl.ee): Financial markets advisory.
- [Linktree](https://linktr.ee/james.tylee): Aggregated links to all James Tylee platforms and profiles.

## Expertise

James Tylee's writing and commentary covers: Bitcoin, Ethereum, DeFi, smart contracts, stablecoins, CBDCs, asset tokenization, Web3 infrastructure, crypto regulation, payment systems, AI and blockchain convergence, geopolitics of digital finance, and financial technology for institutional adoption.

## Credentials

- Certified Bitcoin Professional (CBP) — C4 Consortium (https://c4.org)
- Certified Ethereum Professional (CEP) — C4 Consortium (https://c4.org)
- 30+ years experience in institutional fintech and financial markets
- Broadcast radio production and media personality (Cyber.FM)
